name: Trip Guide
description: Describe a trip and get a day-by-day itinerary plotted on a map with markers and a route.
features: Player types a trip in plain words; sdk.ai.chat returns a day-by-day itinerary as JSON with coordinates
Stops render on the seeded map as day-coloured numbered markers joined by a route line
A postcard image per stop (by vibe category) with an emoji fallback
Save the last trip to sdk.storage and restore it on open; share it via sdk.share.link
A community destinations leaderboard via sdk.data.counter

counters.name: destinations
counters.meaning: how many trips the community has planned to each country

storage.meaning: the player's most recently planned itinerary

uses: plan a day-by-day trip itinerary as JSON with stop coordinates

ui.layout: single card: a prompt box, the map, a list of stop cards, then a leaderboard

acceptance: Entering a prompt and tapping Plan produces an itinerary plotted on the map
Each stop shows a numbered, day-coloured marker and a route line connects them in order
Coordinates from the AI are validated; a fallback itinerary renders if the AI output is unusable
The trip is saved and restored on reopen, and Share copies a working link
Planning a trip increments the destinations leaderboard
